title: The Regular Harbor Commission Meeting for September 11, 2024 is canceled
summary: The Regular Harbor Commission Meeting for September 11, 2024 is canceled. The next regular meeting is scheduled for October 9, 2024. The post The Regular Harbor Commission Meeting for September 11, 2024 is canceled appeared first on City of Cordova, Alaska .
